markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's AI-driven content model for Assort Health's SEO needs.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Core Conflict:** Assort Health needs foundational site pages (e.g., for specialties like cardiology) to convert visitors, but GrowthX's model focuses on high-volume editorial content (5 articles/week) to build search authority.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [**The Proposed Solution:** GrowthX may create the content for these foundational pages, but Assort Health must provide the design and development. This requires a custom scope beyond the standard editorial package.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [**The Strategic Trade-off:** Assort Health must choose between two agency models: a traditional agency (Directive Consulting) that prioritizes foundational pages first, or GrowthX's high-volume, AI-driven content engine.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** A follow-up call is set for Wednesday to discuss pricing, the engagement model, and GrowthX's final decision on the custom scope.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)

## Topics

### Assort Health's SEO Challenge

  - [**Goal:** Build SEO/AEO from scratch to drive long-term growth.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [**Current State:** The website is minimal (13 indexed pages), lacking core content for specialties like cardiology or pediatrics.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [**Strategic Concern:** High-volume editorial content is ineffective if visitors land on a page and immediately bounce due to a lack of relevant product/service information.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Solution

  - [**Model:** An end-to-end partner using AI workflows to scale content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [**Origin:** Founded by Marcel, who pioneered this model at DeepGram, achieving 24x traffic and 4x revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (8-Week Sprint):** Strategy development, audience/brand context engineering, and a 3-6 month content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (12-Month Execution):** High-volume content creation (target: 5 articles/week).](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [**Tooling:** Includes a proprietary LLM monitoring platform (built to fill gaps in tools like Profound/Scrunch).](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [**Case Study (Augment Code):** 3x traffic, eliminated paid spend, and achieved AI search visibility over competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)

### Reconciling the Two Approaches

  - [**Assort Health's Need:** Foundational pages for specialties (e.g., cardiology) to provide a clear user journey and improve conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Position:** The standard model is editorial content. However, a custom scope for foundational pages is possible if Assort Health handles design/dev.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [**The Alternative (Directive Consulting):** A traditional agency that prioritizes building out core pages *before* scaling editorial content.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Brooke:** Share the Directive Consulting proposal slides with Tyler for context.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [**Tyler:** Consult the GrowthX team on the feasibility and scope of creating foundational "who we serve" pages.](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [**Both:** Attend the follow-up call on Wednesday to discuss:](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
      - [Pricing](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
      - [Engagement model (team, touchpoints)](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
      - [GrowthX's decision on the custom scope](https://fathom.video/share/_hr_qinHNtmzc9bRnQdz7WY3-nbqTKe3?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
